seo.title: Remix implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Remix projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist provides a technical framework for preparing a Remix application for production, focusing on server-side reliability, data integrity, and progressive enhancement patterns.

items.title: Implement Route-Level ErrorBoundaries
items.description: Ensure every route with a loader or action exports an ErrorBoundary to prevent server-side crashes from bubbling up to the root and breaking the entire application.

items.title: Optimize Non-Critical Data with Defer
items.description: Identify slow third-party API calls or heavy database queries and move them to a deferred promise using the Remix 'defer' utility to improve Time to First Byte (TTFB).

items.title: Set Cache-Control Headers in Loaders
items.description: Explicitly define Cache-Control headers in loader responses for static or slow-changing data to leverage CDN and browser caching.

items.title: Validate Loader Params
items.description: Check that all dynamic route parameters (e.g., params.id) are validated using a schema library like Zod before passing them to database queries.

items.title: Handle 404 Responses in Loaders
items.description: Throw a 404 Response object within loaders when a resource is not found to trigger the nearest ErrorBoundary with isRouteErrorResponse.

items.title: Server-Side Input Validation
items.description: Implement Zod or Valibot schemas within action functions to validate all incoming FormData before processing mutations.

items.title: Implement CSRF Protection
items.description: Verify that all non-GET requests are protected against CSRF using remix-utils or custom header verification if not using the built-in authenticity token patterns.

items.title: Add Pending UI States
items.description: Use useNavigation to implement 'submitting' or 'loading' states on buttons and forms to provide immediate feedback during mutations.

items.title: Implement Optimistic UI
items.description: Use useFetcher or useNavigation.formData to optimistically update the UI for high-frequency actions like toggling checkboxes or deleting items.

items.title: Prevent Double Submissions
items.description: Disable submit buttons or implement server-side idempotency keys to prevent duplicate data entry on slow network connections.

items.title: Secure Cookie Configuration
items.description: Verify that session cookies are configured with 'httpOnly: true', 'secure: true', and 'sameSite: "lax"' (or "strict") in the createCookieSessionStorage settings.

items.title: Rotate Session Secrets
items.description: Ensure the SESSION_SECRET environment variable is long, random, and not committed to version control.

items.title: Validate Environment Variables at Startup
items.description: Add a validation script in entry.server.tsx or a separate init file to throw an error if required production environment variables are missing.

items.title: Sanitize Redirect URLs
items.description: Ensure that 'redirectTo' parameters in login or multi-step forms are validated against a whitelist to prevent Open Redirect vulnerabilities.

items.title: Content Security Policy (CSP) Headers
items.description: Implement a CSP header in the entry.server.tsx 'handleRequest' function to restrict script execution and style sources.

items.title: Configure Asset Fingerprinting
items.description: Verify that the Remix build process is correctly appending hashes to assets and that the server is serving them with long-lived 'immutable' cache headers.

items.title: Preload Critical Assets
items.description: Utilize the 'links' function to preload critical fonts or hero images for specific routes to improve Largest Contentful Paint (LCP).

items.title: Bundle Analysis
items.description: Run a bundle analyzer (e.g., esbuild-visualizer) to identify and remove large dependencies that are inadvertently included in the client-side bundle.

items.title: Image Optimization Strategy
items.description: Ensure images are served in modern formats (WebP/AVIF) and use the 'srcset' attribute for responsive sizing.

items.title: Enable Gzip/Brotli Compression
items.description: Confirm that the hosting provider or the Express/Node server adapter has compression enabled for text-based assets and HTML responses.

items.title: Production Build Verification
items.description: Verify that 'remix build' is executed with NODE_ENV set to 'production' to ensure React development checks are disabled.

items.title: Health Check Endpoint
items.description: Create a resource route at /healthcheck that verifies database and cache connectivity for automated load balancer health checks.

items.title: Database Connection Pooling
items.description: If deploying to a serverless environment (e.g., Cloudflare Workers or AWS Lambda), implement a connection pooler like Prisma Accelerate or PgBouncer.

items.title: Logger Integration
items.description: Replace console.log with a structured logging library (e.g., Pino or Winston) in loaders and actions for better observability in production logs.

items.title: Sentry or Error Tracking Setup
items.description: Integrate Sentry or a similar service within entry.client.tsx and entry.server.tsx to capture runtime exceptions and sourcemaps.

items.title: Dynamic Meta Tags
items.description: Implement the 'meta' function for every public route to ensure unique titles, descriptions, and Open Graph tags based on loader data.

items.title: Canonical URL Implementation
items.description: Ensure every page includes a canonical link tag to prevent duplicate content issues, especially when using query parameters for filtering.

items.title: Sitemap Generation
items.description: Configure an automated sitemap generation script or resource route that dynamically lists all public-facing URLs.

items.title: Robots.txt Configuration
items.description: Add a robots.txt file to the public directory or as a resource route to control crawler access to sensitive paths like /admin or /api.

items.title: Structured Data (JSON-LD)
items.description: Inject JSON-LD structured data into the head for product, article, or organization pages to improve search engine rich snippets.
